song.title: All Is Well
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C E
song.lyrics:
[v1] . A Asus 1) He lowers us to raise us .A Asus So we can sing His praises .A Asus Whatever is His way all is well .A Asus He make us rich and poor .A Asus That we might trust Him more .A Asus A Asus A Whatever is His way all is well [P] Pre-Chorus .E D A D A All my changes come from Him| He who never changes .E D A D E I'm held firm in the grasp| Of the Rock of all the ages [C] Chorus . A D E A Asus All is well with my soul| He is God in control . A D E A Asus I know not all His plans| But I know I'm in His hands [v2] . A Asus 2) He clothes us now and strips us .A Asus Yet with His Word equips us .A Asus A Whatever is His way all is well .A Asus And though our seasons change .A Asus We still exalt His Name .A Asus A Asus A Whatever is His way all is well
[E] 1) He lowers us to raise us So we can sing His praises Whatever is His way all is well He make us rich and poor That we might trust Him more Whatever is His way all is well Pre-Chorus All my changes come from Him He who never changes I'm held firm in the grasp Of the Rock of all the ages Chorus All is well with my soul He is God in control I know not all His plans But I know I'm in His hands 2) He clothes us now and strips us Yet with His Word equips us Whatever is His way all is well And though our seasons change We still exalt His Name Whatever is His way all is well
